narrative:
West Chester Twp 33 (precinct in Butler County) has 790 registered voters, with 52.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.1 percentage points.
